calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Continued To Nov-18-16 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, Maintaining Current Trial Date
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Tiffany Viveros of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Yvonne Olsen, as successor-in-interest to and as wrongful death heir of Ronald Olsen, deceased, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, MAINTAINING CURRENT TRIAL DATE

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to maintain the trial date with preference status is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a) & (d). The November 14, 2016 trial date is maintained with preference status. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is January 11, 2017. All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain dictated by the November 14, 2016 trial date pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by November 8, 2016 at 12:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on November 10, 2016. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on November 14, 2016 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by November 10, 2016 at 2:00p.m. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Person with a Disability's Compromise. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Petitioner: Jeffrey Olsen, son and guardian ad litem for Person with a Disability, Yvonne Olsen: not present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined, appeared through court call.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $170,085.00
Attorney's Fees: $44,839.05 payable to Law Firm of Brayton Purcell LLP
Costs: $20,289.24
A net balance of $104,956.71 to be payable directly to Yvonne Olsen, as trustee of the Olsen Family Trust.

Court signed Order Granting approval of a Person with a Disability.
Status Hearing Scheduled on Nov 17, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for deposit of money to be held in the name of the Olsen Family Trust, with Yvonne Olsen as trustee.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
